context.audience: Developers building content-heavy sites and blogs, teams evaluating headless CMS options, publishers and media companies modernizing their content infrastructure
pain_points: Choosing between headless CMS platforms like Contentful, Sanity, Strapi, and Payload
Integrating AI content generation into CMS editorial workflows
Content modeling decisions that scale with growing content types and relationships
Performance at scale with thousands of pages and complex content queries
Migration between CMS platforms without losing content structure and SEO
